data.title: Helium Evolution reports new seismic plan, pooling deal, and operational progress.
data.description: A recent report reveals that over 1 million students in the U.S. were affected by school closures due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The study found that 70% of these students lacked access to adequate technology for remote learning. Additionally, 40% of teachers reported difficulties in providing online instruction and support to their students. The closures disproportionately affected low-income areas, with 60% of students in these communities lacking access to the internet or necessary devices. Experts warn that these disparities could have long-term consequences on the education and future prospects of these students. Efforts are being made to address these challenges, such as providing devices and internet access to students in need.

data.title: Trident Resources acquires strategic claims in La Ronge Gold Belt; gains option for up to 100% interest in 5,395 hectares.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on January 19, 2026, Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V: ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) has successfully finalized a transaction following TSX Venture Exchange approval. The agreement, dated October 21st, 2025, with Edge Geological Consulting Inc. allows Trident to acquire up to 100% interest in 16 mineral dispositions from 5 claim blocks totaling 5,395 hectares within the Longe Gold Belt. This development comes after the news release on October 22nd, 2025.

data.title: Parex Resources reveals 2026 guidance, Wayne Foo to retire as Board Chair, Glenn McNamara to take over.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on January 19, 2026, Parex Resources Inc. ("Parex" or the "Company") (TSX: PXT) has released its 2026 guidance. The company announced that Wayne Foo will retire as Board Chair and Director of the Board on May 12, 2026. In a planned succession, current Vice Chair and Director, Glenn McNamara, will take over as Chair. All figures mentioned are in United States Dollars ("USD").

data.title: Centerra Gold's Kemess PEA reveals robust economics, bolstering the company's growth pipeline.
data.description: In the latest data, it was reported that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 worldwide has surged past 5.6 million, with over 350,000 deaths. The United States remains the most heavily affected country with over 1.6 million cases and 100,000 fatalities. In other news, the global economy continues to struggle, with over 40 million job losses in the US alone. Governments are implementing various measures to address the impacts of the pandemic, such as stimulus packages and support for businesses. Experts warn that the road to recovery will be long and challenging.

data.title: La Maison Younan owns and operates luxury château hotels in the Loire Valley, offering modern amenities while preserving historic charm.
data.description: La Maison Younan is a luxury hospitality group in the Loire Valley, owning and operating a collection of historic château hotels restored to five-star standards. Zaya Younan, CEO, aims to make luxury accessible to all. Their portfolio includes the Alexandra Palace, a five-star palace hotel with an 18-hole golf course; Château de Beauvois, a four-star estate known for its refined atmosphere and dining; Château Le Prieuré, a romantic château hotel overlooking the Loire River; and Hôtel Saint Martin, an intimate luxury retreat. These properties offer guests the experience of living like royalty, combining history, beauty, and impeccable service.

data.title: Power Metallic reports high recoveries in initial metallurgical results: 98.9% Copper, 93.9% Palladium, 96.8% Platinum, 85% Gold, and 88.9% Silver.
data.description: In Toronto on January 19, 2026, Power Metallic Mines Inc. (referred to as "Power Metallic") (TSXV: PNPN) (OTCBB: PNPNF) (Frankfurt: IVV) shared positive initial metallurgical findings from testing conducted by SGS Canada Ltd1 in Quebec City.

data.title: Avante Corp. secures gunshot detection deployment with Ontario regional police for three high-crime locations.
data.description: Avante Corp, a leading provider of technology-enabled security solutions (TSX.V: XX), has recently signed a deployment agreement with a regional police force in Ontario. The agreement involves implementing their Gunshot Detection system in three undisclosed high-crime areas of the region. This move signifies Avante's commitment to enhancing public safety and preventing criminal activities in the specified locations.

data.title: Ashland Inc. board declares $0.415 quarterly dividend for company's NYSE: ASH common stock.
data.description: Ashland Inc. (NYSE: ASH) has announced that the board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.415 per share for the company's common stock. It is welcomed news for shareholders as they will receive this dividend for each share they hold in the company.

data.title: CEMATRIX wins $7.1 million in new contract awards for cellular concrete solutions, leading manufacturer in North America.
data.description: CEMATRIX Corporation, a specialty construction contractor and major producer of cellular concrete solutions in North America, has recently secured new contract awards totaling $7.1 million. This announcement was made in Calgary, Alberta, on January 19, 2026. CEMATRIX, listed on the TSX as CEMX and OTCQB as CTXXF, continues to solidify its position as a leading provider of innovative construction solutions.

data.title: Ritchie Bros. prepares for February 2026 Orlando auction with featured equipment. Event on Feb. 16-20, world's largest auction. Transaction solutions for commercial assets and vehicles.
data.description: RB Global, Inc., a leading global marketplace for commercial assets and vehicles, provided updates on the Ritchie Bros. Auctioneers February 2026 Orlando auction. The event, scheduled from Feb. 16 to 20 at the Orlando facility, is renowned as the largest equipment auction globally. RB Global, Inc. trades on NYSE under RBA and TSX as RBA. The auction will showcase featured equipment highlights and serve as a platform for buyers and sellers to converge.

data.title: Meritage reports 2025 unaudited results ahead of conference, indicates sales and margin recovery in 2026.
data.description: Meritage Hospitality Group Inc., a leading franchise operator in the United States (OTCQX: MHGU), has released its initial financial figures for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 28, 2025, from Grand Rapids, Mich. The company will be showcasing these results at the upcoming Sidoti Micro-Cap Conference.

data.title: Power Integrations (Nasdaq: POWI) to report Q4 financial results on February 5, 2026, with conference call at 1:30 PM PST.
data.description: Power Integrations (Nasdaq: POWI) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on February 5, 2026, after the market closes in San Jose, Calif. This will be followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time. Those interested in joining the call can register via the link: https://events.q4inc.com/analyst/206629993?pwd=K6iyyyW6. The call will also be accessible through a live and archived audio webcast.

data.title: Power Knot installed a food waste system at a busy airport catering facility, utilizing organic waste management solutions.
data.description: In Fremont, California, on January 19, 2026, Power Knot unveiled the completion of a cutting-edge food waste processing system at a catering establishment within a major global airport. As a top provider of onsite organic waste solutions, Power Knot's installation marks a significant milestone. This fully integrated system is designed to efficiently manage food waste and will play a crucial role in the sustainable waste management practices of the airport. The facility can process a substantial amount of food waste, making it a key player in reducing environmental impact and promoting eco-friendly initiatives within the busy airport.

data.title: CUPE enters arbitration with Air Canada over rejected wage offer; flight attendants voted over 99% against offer.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, the Air Canada Component of the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) has initiated arbitration proceedings with Air Canada and Arbitrator Paula Knopf to address wage disputes following a vote by flight attendants where over 99% rejected Air Canada's proposed wages in September 2025. The hearings aim to shed light on the negotiation process from December 2024 to August 2025, offering members insights into the details of the discussions and potential outcomes moving forward.

data.title: Golfer Bubba Watson appointed Global Ambassador of Hope for Convoy of Hope, a relief org helping millions globally.
data.description: Today, in Springfield, Missouri, Convoy of Hope, a well-known faith-based relief organization, revealed that Bubba and Angie Watson have been selected as Global Ambassadors. This organization is recognized for aiding individuals affected by poverty, disasters, and crises worldwide. The announcement was made on Jan. 19, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.title: McFarlane Lake Mining Limited to attend the Vancouver Resource Investment Conference on Jan 25–26, 2026 and engages Market Link and EMC for digital marketing. (Word count: 24)
data.description: On January 19, 2026, McFarlane Lake Mining Limited disclosed it will attend the Vancouver Resource Investment Conference (VRIC) on January 25–26, 2026, at the Vancouver Convention Centre in British Columbia. The company, listed as CSE: MLM and OTC: MLMLF, also revealed partnerships with The Market Link (Market Link) and Emerging Markets Consulting (EMC) for digital marketing services.

data.title: FDA approves VETMEDIN® to delay onset of heart failure in dogs, affecting 10% in lifetime, for preclinical mitral valve disease - Boehringer Ingelheim.
data.description: Around 10% of dogs are impacted by heart disease at some point in their lives. VETMEDIN® (pimobendan) by Boehringer Ingelheim is the lone approved medication for addressing preclinical mitral valve disease in dogs. The FDA has expanded their conditional approval, allowing for wider application of this medication in treating...
